sections.research_overview:
## 2. 研究概述



### 2.1 研究主題

> UniOcc is a unified benchmark and toolkit for occupancy forecasting (future) and occupancy prediction (current) in autonomous driving. It integrates real-world (nuScenes, Waymo) and simulated (CARLA, OpenCOOD) datasets with 2D/3D occupancy labels and per-voxel flow annotations, and introduces label-independent evaluation metrics showing that diverse large-scale data and explicit flow improve performance.

### 2.2 研究領域分類

- [x] World Model (世界模型)
- [ ] Video Generation (影片生成)
- [x] 3D Scene Understanding (3D場景理解)
- [ ] Motion Planning (運動規劃)
- [ ] End-to-End Driving (端到端駕駛)
- [x] Simulation (模擬器)
- [x] Occupancy Prediction (佔用預測)
- [ ] Neural Rendering (神經渲染)

### 2.3 所使用的自動駕駛架構

- [x] **Modular Pipeline** (模組化管線)
- [ ] **End-to-End** (端到端)
- [ ] **World Model + Planner** (世界模型 + 規劃器)
- [ ] **Foundation Model** (基石模型)

---
